calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Edgardo Lopez, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff: Eric Guerra, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Ephraim Manlapez.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

General Damages $17,095.80
Pain & Suffering $30,000.00
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.
